provenance.vina_pseudo_kd_note: exp(ΔG/RT) of the Vina score; NOT a measured or calibrated affinity — Vina ranks by size/contact, not Kd (issue #4). Do not read as binding strength.
provenance.engagement_note: docked into an experimentally-resolved binding site with a reproducible multi-seed pose (geometric engagement, not affinity)

price_calls.name: Amgen
price_calls.rationale: Trial NCT-REAL-0001 endpoint met. Docking score ΔG -7.202±0.187 (n=3) kcal/mol (relative, size-confounded — not an affinity; issue #4). Target engagement: experimental-site (geometry, not strength). Drug-likeness flag (≥2 Lipinski violations) — informational, predicts oral absorption, not toxicity; not priced into the call. PoS delta +0.50.
